title: Tracker Item
description: The details of the items in the shipment.

quantity.description: The item quantity. Must be a whole number.

sku.description: The stock keeping unit (SKU) for the item. This can contain unicode characters.

url.description: The URL to the item being purchased. Visible to buyer and used in buyer experiences.

image_url.description: The URL of the item's image. File type and size restrictions apply. An image that violates these restrictions will not be honored.

upc.description: The Universal Product Code of the item.
